title: Jump Game II
input_format: An integer array `nums` where `nums[i]` represents the maximum jump length from position `i`.
output_format: Return the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index.
constraints:
- `1 <= nums.length <= 10^4`
- `0 <= nums[i] <= 1000`
- It is guaranteed that you can reach `nums[n - 1]`.
